Welcome to CalcYouLater

The calculator that waits for you — packed with features you didn't know you needed.

This installer will place CalcYouLater.app into your /Applications folder. You can move it anywhere afterwards.

What's inside:

  • Basic & chained arithmetic with full keyboard support
  • Scientific mode — sin/cos/tan/log/√/xʸ/n!/π/e and more
  • Calculation history (tap to recall, swipe to delete)
  • Unit converter — length, weight, temperature, area, volume, speed
  • Memory functions — MC / MR / M+ / M−
  • System / Light / Dark appearance

Click Continue to proceed.
